sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30991" key="ei)kosi/edros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰκοσῐ´-εδρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n30991.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">εἰκοσάεδρος</ref></xr>, Ti. <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dialect" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Locr.</gram> </gramGrp> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4083.tlg001:98d" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">98d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
